home.listenDescription: 60 seconds of therapeutic tone to calm the vestibular system before your journey.
home.motionCuesDescription: Eight breathing dots at the screen edges follow your vehicle's motion — reconciling sight and sense.
home.researchNote: Based on research from Nagoya University (2025) and Apple's Vehicle Motion Cues.

audio.title: Audio Therapy
audio.volumeGuide: Put on headphones and set volume to a comfortable level.
audio.volumeTip: The sound should be clearly audible but never uncomfortable.

done.title: All Done
done.message: Your 100 Hz session is complete. Take a breath and start your journey.
done.disclaimer: Results may vary by individual. Based on research from Nagoya University.

motionCues.title: Motion Cues
motionCues.howItWorks: 8 subtle dots on your screen edges move with your vehicle's motion, helping your brain reconcile what your eyes see with what your body feels.

onboarding.slide1Caption: When your car turns, accelerates, or brakes, the dots move accordingly — helping your brain synchronize vision with motion.
onboarding.slide2Source: Based on research from Apple and Nagoya University
onboarding.slide3Reason: So the dots appear when you use TikTok, YouTube, or any other app
onboarding.slide3Privacy: Serene never reads the content of your screen.

control.activeDescription: Dots are showing on all apps
control.permissionDescription: Serene needs permission to display dots over other apps

onboarding.slide1Title: Your iPhone already has this feature
onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Apple calls it Vehicle Motion Cues — available on iOS 18 and later.
onboarding.slide1Description: We'll walk you through enabling it in seconds.
onboarding.slide2Tip: Tip: You can also add it to Control Center for quick toggling.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: We'll open the Accessibility settings directly for you.

control.appleCuesDescription: Works across all apps, even when Serene is closed
control.inAppDescription: Show dots while using Serene (foreground only)
control.unsupportedVersion: This feature requires iOS 18 or later. Please update your iPhone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.aboutDescription: Serene combines 100 Hz audio therapy and motion cues overlay to help reduce motion sickness symptoms during travel.
settings.research: Based on research from Nagoya University, Japan
